creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
INVARIANTS does not crash.  I waited for several days and no fault detected.

I updated the hosts to ALPHA6 and one of the hosts crashed after a few days of uptime.

I have dumped the crash/kernel/debug into freefall.freebsd.org:~sbruno/service1.rbsd.tar again.  It still looks like corruption of the callout structs.  

I can try bisecting, but I'm unsure how to make the machine reliably fall over except to wait for 48 hours.
